title: licania micrantha var. triandra
intro: Licania micrantha var. triandra is a plant species within the family Chrysobalanaceae, commonly known as a variety of the Licania micrantha plant, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Licania micrantha var. triandra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and decocting the leaves or roots to create teas, infusions, or topical applications for treating a range of ailments.
